docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORP.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, REED AS TO DEFENDANT VHX CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-29-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VHX CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, REED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VHX CORPORATION I FIND NO BREACH OF CONTRACT BY DEFENDANT; FULL PAYMENT WAS DUE THREE MONTHS AFTER THE PARTIES ENTERED THE CONTRACT AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT MAKE FULL PAYMENT. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF WANTED KINDLE FIRE ACCESS, THE CONTRACT REQUIRED HIM TO MAKE PAYMENT BEFORE RECEIVING IT AND HE DID NOT DO SO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, REED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT VHX CORPORATION
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TAYLOR, REED AS TO DEFENDANT VHX CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF REED TAYLOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VHX CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MIAHCAEL EADES, PRODUCT MANAGER, AND MICHAEL VIGNAPINAO VP OF ACCOUNT MANAGEMENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
